name: Sopaipillas (Puffy Fried Bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, salt, baking powder, and sugar.
2. Cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add milk to form a soft dough that is firm enough to roll.
4. Cover and let the dough rest for 30 to 60 minutes.
5. Roll out the dough to about 1/4 inch thickness on a lightly floured surface.
6. Cut into diamond-shaped pieces.
7. Heat oil in a frying pan to about 370°F to 380°F.
8. Fry a few pieces at a time, turning once they puff up to ensure even cooking.
9. Turn back to brown both sides before draining on paper towels.
10. Serve hot; makes approximately 4 dozen or more.
